page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Wraps BEDTools for use in Python and adds many additional features.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Wraps BEDTools for use in Python and adds many additional features.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Python extension to BEDTools that allows use of all BEDTools programs directly from Python, as well as feature-by-feature manipulation, automatic handling of temporary files, and more.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Python extension to BEDTools that allows use of all BEDTools programs directly from Python, as well as feature-by-feature manipulation, automatic handling of temporary files, and more.
